textByHash.b5be990c1651c8b1f1dad5fd3e7d49eaae047364: Ah, you come for fight, ja?
textByHash.fe308818bd9f48f0ad26655e8456a8ac560ee77d: Hah! What you want with me, little city man?
textByHash.d0cf2e212fc13a63627bcd6b0973bc5d6e7aba6d: Hah! What you want with me, little city woman?
textByHash.b1e149c6454c8ec61ac5b3e35d852aa618c97941: Hah! What you want with me, little city person?
textByHash.a2e487fca37e09f2c0ab9d603e928ba4e98d9ec9: Ha ha ha! Little wants to buy me a drink, how sweet.
textByHash.de2ddf3965420f49bf5db0bc915d3df9528587af: You not talk like barbarian man. You certainly not smell like barbarian man! But I think I give you test anyway.
textByHash.c95696d01a521e6c12d4591883355a6cc55f7ccc: You not talk like barbarian woman. You certainly not smell like barbarian man! But I think I give you test anyway.

textByHash.0ffd5a6b52808c7c56e9b9f6e2e02e542d21d47c: You not talk like barbarian woman. You certainly not smell like barbarian woman! But I think I give you test anyway.
textByHash.f1fa0fb2f5176546c88d553ab59089b748bab788: You not talk like barbarian person. You certainly not smell like barbarian woman! But I think I give you test anyway.
textByHash.c48342cbb82ef9ef76a5446fcfdf7d583f5b7245: You not talk like barbarian man. You certainly not smell like barbarian person! But I think I give you test anyway.

textByHash.e9c9a06b56d03eb9bb7a079dcb698cd9002cc039: You not talk like barbarian person. You certainly not smell like barbarian person! But I think I give you test anyway.
textByHash.045f4afe2c3a5ba59983eda22e0041fabf4b6881: Back in village to the west, we barbarians scream our defiance as we fight. We scream 'YYEEEEEAAARRRRGGHHHH!!!' Can you do this?
textByHash.670c2ff0fd2ca022d122c061afb0b040fc4756c4: Ha ha ha! Little cannot yell like barbarian. Also, I strong barbarian woman; I get my own drink. Run away now, little .
textByHash.d1b35b91e3a28e1788fe1e1f3811dc1cbdaf5223: Ha ha ha! We fight anytime you like.
textByHash.87311ffe6bd6a7bc29286a170a294d7079ec9536: Ha ha ha! I not interested in talking to soft city man who not know what he want.
textByHash.2be07a1578235f019d97a611c90ae6d441cf7397: Ha ha ha! I not interested in talking to soft city woman who not know what he want.
textByHash.f17b530629450941de281d59b65c487203d038e1: Ha ha ha! I not interested in talking to soft city person who not know what he want.
